title: Require MapGen Exported Value Declarations To Have JSDoc
forbids: authored MapGen runtime value exports without adjacent nonempty declaration-site JSDoc or with an obvious placeholder JSDoc block
why: Exported values are cross-module contracts; declaration-site documentation keeps their owner and intended semantics visible through reuse and relocation, while review owns the document's semantic quality.
remediate: Delete an unused export or add adjacent nonempty, non-placeholder JSDoc before its defining declaration. Document purpose, behavior, or invariants when they are not already obvious. A direct anonymous default value is documented at the export statement; re-export barrels inherit the owner's documentation.
message: Exported MapGen value declarations require adjacent nonempty non-placeholder declaration-site JSDoc.
